omopColumns.name: nhs_number

dataSource.name: NhsNumber
dataSource.description: The unique NHS NUMBER allocated to every patient registered with the NHS.

omopColumns.query:
-- Extracts diagnostic procedure OPCS codes for the Urological cancer area (COSD v9).
-- These represent diagnostic procedures carried out, identified by OPCS code.
-- The OPCS code will be mapped to a standard OMOP procedure_concept_id in a later ETL step.
-- DiagnosticProcedureDate is a string in CCYY-MM-DD format and will be cast to a date type downstream.
select distinct
    Record ->> '$.LinkagePatientId.NhsNumber.@extension' as NhsNumber,
    Record ->> '$.DiagnosticProcedures.DiagnosticProcedureDate' as DiagnosticProcedureDate,
    Record ->> '$.DiagnosticProcedures.DiagnosticProcedureOpcs.@code' as DiagnosticProcedureOpcs
from omop_staging.cosd_staging_901
where type = 'UR'
  and NhsNumber is not null
  and DiagnosticProcedureOpcs is not null;

omopColumns.name: procedure_concept_id
omopColumns.operation_description: Maps concepts to standard valid concepts in the `procedure` domain.

omopColumns.name: procedure_date

dataSource.name: DiagnosticProcedureDate
dataSource.description: Procedure date of the diagnostic procedure. Same as the ACTIVITY DATE attribute for this diagnostic procedure.

omopColumns.query:
-- Extracts diagnostic procedure OPCS codes for the Urological cancer area (COSD v9).
-- These represent diagnostic procedures carried out, identified by OPCS code.
-- The OPCS code will be mapped to a standard OMOP procedure_concept_id in a later ETL step.
-- DiagnosticProcedureDate is a string in CCYY-MM-DD format and will be cast to a date type downstream.
select distinct
    Record ->> '$.LinkagePatientId.NhsNumber.@extension' as NhsNumber,
    Record ->> '$.DiagnosticProcedures.DiagnosticProcedureDate' as DiagnosticProcedureDate,
    Record ->> '$.DiagnosticProcedures.DiagnosticProcedureOpcs.@code' as DiagnosticProcedureOpcs
from omop_staging.cosd_staging_901
where type = 'UR'
  and NhsNumber is not null
  and DiagnosticProcedureOpcs is not null;

omopColumns.name: procedure_type_concept_id
omopColumns.operation_description: Constant value set to `32879`. `EHR episode record`

omopColumns.name: procedure_source_value

dataSource.name: DiagnosticProcedureOpcs
dataSource.description: The OPCS Classification of Interventions and Procedures code used to identify the diagnostic procedure carried out.

omopColumns.name: procedure_source_concept_id
omopColumns.operation_description: Resolve OPCS4 codes to OMOP concepts. If code cannot be mapped, map using the parent code.

dataSource.name: DiagnosticProcedureOpcs
dataSource.description: The OPCS Classification of Interventions and Procedures code used to identify the diagnostic procedure carried out.
